---
id: unbind-device
title: "设备解绑"
description: "解绑一个指定设备。解绑成功后，您无法在 Aqara Studio 中看到该设备。"
sidebar_label: "设备解绑"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"设备解绑"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/unbind"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



解绑一个指定设备。解绑成功后，您无法在 Aqara Studio 中看到该设备。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"解绑目标的设备 ID。"}},"title":"DeviceUnbindRequest"},"examples":{"unbindDevice":{"value":{"deviceId":"device-001"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}
